utility based agent:
* Knowing goals is not enough to get high quality behaviour.
* For example we can't predict what will happen while driving a taxi.
* we only know actions that leads us to achieve goal (destination)
* So utility is numbered measurement of preference given to an set of actions
* So in this agent type utility function is used to achieve goal, by assuming preference to the actions.
* eni tani driver can reach the destination safe, comfortable trip, minimum fuel consumption.
